description.short: A Teams banking assistant built with the Microsoft 365 Agents SDK.
description.full: A sample Teams-hosted banking assistant for the Agent Modernization Workshops. It shows welcome messaging, message routing, Adaptive Cards, and an optional Azure AI Foundry extension.

commands.title: show accounts
commands.description: Display the sample accounts for a workshop customer.

commands.title: show balance
commands.description: Display checking or savings balances for a workshop customer.

commands.title: show transactions
commands.description: Display recent transactions for a workshop customer.
